programmes.show_description: Tagann athrú gan choinne ar mhisean Walt. Ligtear Amado amach as an bpríosún tar éis trí mhí. (Walt's undercover mission takes a turn. Amado is released after 3 months in prison.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Le cósta i ndeisceart Thír Chonaill a bheidh Áine an tseachtain seo. (Áine continues her journey of discovery on the west coast.)
Buaicphointí ó chluichí CLG agus Peil na mBan sraitheanna Allianz agus Lidl. (Highlights of the weekend's best GAA and Ladies Football action from the Allianz and Lidl leagues.)
Chris Murphy, tionchaire as Co. na Mí, a bheidh ag iarraidh a chuid nósanna siopadóireachta a athrú inniu. (We meet Chris Murphy who expresses himself through colourful outfits.)
Is í Treasa McClafferty as Toraigh a bheidh ar chlár na seachtaine seo. (Tory Island native Teresa McClafferty sings her favourite songs.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Níl a fhios ag Bréidín cá bhfuair Clúmh an ruidín beag bog atá aige. (Fluff is playing with a little soft thing and Tweedy isn't sure where Fluff got it from.)
Tugann na Singalings aghaidh ar an gcathair áit a bhfuil neart le feiceáil! (The Singalings are in the city where there are lots of things to see, even in the sky!)
Éiríonn le Buí go leor a dhathú. (Yellow has fun with all the new things he has coloured in.)
Cuireann Cory agus Freddie comhairle ar Bhreandán an Bhruscair chun Gráinne a mhealladh. (Cory and Freddie give Gary Garbage advice on how to woo Sheryl.)
Tá inneall Bobby an Bhus salach agus tá Fiona Inneall Dóiteáin ag iarraidh bonnán níos airde. (Bobby the Bus' engine is dirty and Fiona the Fire Engine wants a louder siren.)
Ar eachtra san iarsmalann a bheidh Abby agus Rudy inniu. (Abby and Rudy are on their next adventure in a museum with animals.)
Tugann Pip faoi deara éan ag tabhairt aire dá cuid uibheacha i nead sa gcrann. (Pip and Posy are playing when Pip sees a bird guarding her eggs.)
Luíonn spáslong sa bhforaois ach níl na hOlobobanna in ann labhairt leis an gcuairteoir. (When a spaceship lands in the forest no one can talk to the visitor.)
Níl Owlette le feiceáil beag ná mór mar gheall ar mheaisín nua Romeo. (Courtesy of Romeo's ray, Owlette becomes invisible.)
Caithfidh Wussywat úlla a bhailiú do Nín ach nach mbíonn siad ag titim uaithi seasta. (Ird needs Wussywat's help to collect the apples but she keeps dropping them.)
Bíonn an-spraoi ag Zou & ag Zak inniu nuair a dhéanann Daideo máireoigín de róbat Zak. (Zou & Zak have great fun today when Grandpa turns Zak's robot into a marionette.)
Bíonn an-spraoi ag Ricky ag ligean air féin gur ridire é. (Today, Ricky has lots of fun as a knight.)
Tá cluiche nua ag Ginger agus na Piseanna-Rex óga. (Ginger and the baby Pea-Rexes discover a new game: Pea-Rex Pinball.)
Tá Dot ag iarraidh airgead a dhéanamh as sneachta. (Dot tries to make money out of snow.)
Tá liathróid peile nua ag Henry agus tá sé ag iarraidh a thaispeáint gur cúl báire maith é. (Henry has a new football and is very keen to show how good he is in goal.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Deir tuismitheoirí Charlie agus Lola leo a seomra a ghlanadh. (Charlie and Lola's parents tell them to clean their room.)
Tá Buaiceasaín i bhfostú istigh i gcoire an ghruagaigh, agus caithfidh Pinocchio teacht i gcabhair air! (Buaiceasaín gets stuck in an ogre's cauldron.)
Caithfidh Pat cúrsaí a chur faoi smacht nuair a thagann éad ar na Guanos. (Pat has to step in when the Guanos get jealous of Caipín's new role.)
Tugann Angelo dialann Elena do Harry. (Angelo gives Harry Elena's secret diary.)
Tá Dónall agus a hamstar an-mhór lena chéile. (Dónall's hamster is his best friend.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi inneall dóiteáin a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about a fire truck.)
Tá uimhir amháin nach bhfuil ádh ar bith air. (Unlucky Thirteen falls apart whenever anyone mentions his name.)
Finscéal a bheidh ag Dearg agus a cairde inniu. (Red and her friends go on a fairytale adventure today.)
Castar Preab ar Ghabh agus Stop, cabhraíonn siad leis an bhFroigín Beag le chéile. (Go and Stop meet Hop, together they help Little Frog with a problem.)
Beidh an coimeádaí zú John ag caint ar eireabaill inniu. (Today at the zoo, John the zookeeper teaches us about the fascinating world of animal tails.)
Tá Pip agus Posy ag imirt peile in aghaidh Frankie agus Zac. (Pip and Posy are playing against Frankie and Zac in a football match.)
Har! Har! Tá Ribín agus Glibín fuadaithe ag foghlaithe mara. An mbeidh siad in ann éalú? (Har! Har! Ribín and Glibín have been captured by the pirates.)
Daltaí Ghaelscoil Cholmcille sa Chúlóg a rachaidh i mbun pinn an tseachtain seo chun amhrán a chumadh faoi amanna an lae. (Music series for children presented by John Sharpson.)
Níl George sásta go bhfuil na ba ag ithe na mbláthanna fiáine. (George loves Leslie the cow but wishes she wouldn't keep eating all the wildflowers.)
Samhlaíonn Faith-Leigh a saol ina feirmeoir nuair a bheidh sí mór le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Faith-Leigh imagines her life as a farmer, with the help of the Job Fairy.)
Glacfaidh Zou agus a chairde páirt i rith spraíúil inniu. (Zou and his friends participate in a fun run today.)
Inniu feicfidh muid gadhair ag scimeáil ar an idirlíon agus ag surfáil ar an bhfarraige! (Today we'll see dogs surfing the internet and actually surfing for real!)
Bernie Ní Fhlatharta a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín Tom Sheáinín ar an gclár seo. (Máirtín Tom Sheáinín chats with former journalist, Bernie Ní Fhlatharta.)
Tá Lois ag ceapadh go bhfuil sí ag súil arís. (Lois thinks she might be pregnant again.)
Ceapann Norm gur bean bhreá í a chliant ach fágann sé sa mbaile í seachas í a mhealladh. (Norm is attracted to his client but rather than seduce her, he drops her home.)
Ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhí againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
Bíonn ar Jessica dul i mbun fiosraithe nuair a dhúnmharaítear an fear atá ag bagairt ar an té a bhfuil sí ag fanacht leis. (A vacation turns into work when a man is murdered.)
Tugann trí fhoireann aghaidh ar a chéile chun an pota óir a bhuachan. Seó cluichí á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín Ní Chonghaile. (Gameshow in which 3 teams compete to win the jackpot.)
Is iad Aoife Welby agus The Shan Vans a thabharfaidh faoin dúshlán sa gclár seo. (Aoife Welby and The Shan Vans swap songs for a musical challenge.)
Tugann Paul Murton aghaidh ar Eilean Arainn áit a bhíonn tarraingt mhór air mar áit saoire. (Paul Murton travels round one of Scotland's holiday destinations, the Isle of Arran.)
Beidh duine de réalta an cheoil tíre, Mick Flavin ag gabháil fhoinn sa gclár seo. (One of country music giants, Mick Flavin gives a captivating performance on Glór Tíre.)
Ní fheileann an saol in Sydney Mark ná Phil níos mó agus tá siad ag bogadh go Macleay Valley. (Mark and Phil have found life in Sydney is no longer the lifestyle they want.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

Tar siar linn go dtí an bhliain 1860. (On this programme we are in the year 1860.)
I nDún Lúiche a bheidh Síle, baile atá suite i bparóiste Ghaoth Dobhair faoi scáth na hEaragaile. (Dún Lúiche is a small village situated under the imposing Mount Errigal.)

Is é Ruarc Ó Confhaola a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Ruarc Ó Confhaola.)
Ceangail do chrios! Beidh muid ag dul thart sa gcarr inniu! (Buckle up, everyone! We're going on a car ride!)
Ar meall mór cáise í an ghealach i ndáiríre? Téann JJ agus Mimi suas ar spáslong go bhfeicfidh siad. (JJ and Mimi go on a spaceship to discover if the moon is made of cheese.)
Ní chreideann Dearg é nuair a chastar Dath nua uirthi. (Red is amazed when she meets a new Colour.)
Tugann Mama cúnamh do Cory lena thogra scoile. (Mama helps Cory with his school project.)
Caithfidh an Meicneoir Gorm teacht i gcabhair ar Eric an Tochaltóir. Tá Gecko sáinnithe i dtollán. (The Blue Mechanic must save Eric the Excavator. Gecko gets stuck in a tunnel.)
Ag foghlaim faoi pháipéir nuachta a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo learns all about newspapers today.)
Tá Pip agus Posy ag iarraidh faitíos a chur ar a chéile tigh Posy. (Pip and Posy are having a spooky day at Posy's house trying to scare each other.)
Tá Iasc Mór i bhfostú i gcrann! (There is a Big Fish stuck up a tree!)
Féachann na Coileáin le seilbh a fháil ar Chnoc Mistéire dóibh féin. (The Wolfies want to takeover Mystery Mountain for themselves tonight.)
Foghlaimíonn Wussywat faoi fhrithchaitheamh nuair a fheiceann sí rud éigin ag lonrú sa ngrian. (When Wussywat sees something glinting in the sun she learns about reflections.)
Cuireann ár gcairde cúram lae do pheataí ar fáil. (Emily Elizabeth opens Clifford and Emily Elizabeth's Awesome Pet Daycare.)
Tá na cairde ag smaoineamh ar na poist a bheidh acu nuair a bheidh siad mór. (What would Woozle and Pip like to do when they grow up?)
Buaileann cara Ginger, an Brocailísár óg, cic ar an liathróid i dtreo na Fatadóin. (Ginger's baby Broccolisaurus friend kicks their ball into Potatodon territory.)
Níl áis éisteachta Ruby ag obair i gceart. (Ruby's hearing aid is not working properly.)
Tá fear bréige Bean Berg ag mealladh na n-éan in áit iad a scanrú. (The scarecrow is supposed to frighten the birds away from Mrs Bergs strawberries but it attracts them.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Is maith le Lola na rudaí a fheiceann sí nuair a bhíonn sí ag faire amach a tharraingt. (Lola likes spying and observing things and then drawing them.)
Cuireann Jia an misean i mbaol nuair a dhéanann sí rud éigin gan smaoineamh ar a cuid cairde. (Jia threatens the mission by making a move that might affect her friends.)
Cabhraíonn Pat le Lola an taisce a aimsiú sula bhfaigheann na Guanos é! (Pat helps Lola to find the treasure before the Guanos do!)
Tá duine éigin níos fearr ná Angelo ag imirt cleas. (Someone is better than Angelo at pranking.)
Seinneann Dónall an t-aerghiotár. (Dónall plays air-guitar.)

Amhrán spraíúil faoi na sléibhte a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about the mountains.)
Téann Ceathair Déag ag clárscátáil. (Meet Extreme Fourteen, the plucky skateboarder with a clever way of getting out of trouble.)
Faigheann na Dathanna amach cé leis is cosúil iad, nó a mhalairt! (The Colours find out who they are like, or unlike!)
Tá uair na cinniúna tagtha do Bhó ach tá cúnamh uaithi! (It's Cow's big moment but she needs help!)
Tá Pompon agus Rita ag sárú ar chéile faoi thoradh ribeach. (A strange furry looking fruit, causes much debate between Pompon and Rita.)
Tá Seán le cáca a dhéanamh as salann, siúcra agus spaigití! (Today Seán makes a cake using sugar, salt and spaghetti.)
Tá Pip agus Posy le cluiche peile a imirt in éineacht lena gcairde. (Pip and Posy are at the park for a game of football with their friends.)
Clár ealaíne ina ndéanann Máire Treasa ceardaíocht agus ealaín lena cara Scú Scú Scuab. (An exciting art series where Máire Treasa does arts and crafts with Scú Scú Scuab.)
Glacann Scratch páirt i gcomórtas do mhadraí. (Scratch takes part in a dog competition.)
Tá comórtas ag Mr. Ali chun an t-uachtar reoite nua is fearr a aimsiú. (Mr. Ali hosts a contest to find the best new ice cream flavour.)
Samhlaíonn Ruarc a shaol ina mhaoirseoir fiadhúlra le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Ruarc imagines his life as a wildlife ranger when he grows up, with the help of the Job Fairy.)
Tá togra dúlra le déanamh ag Zou agus Elzee don obair bhaile agus tá ag éirí go maith leo. (Zou & Elzee have a nature project for homework and they are doing great work.)
Téann Tiggy ag iascaireacht inniu le greim a fháil ar an iasc is úire sa loch. (Tiggy decides to go fishing today to catch the freshest fish in the lake.)
Ar an gclár inniu beidh madraí a chaitheann hataí, creimirí móra, lachain agus neart eile! (Today we'll see dogs wearing hats, rodents of unusual size, ducks and lots more!)
Seosamh Ó Cualáin iarsháirsint leis na gardaí a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín ar an gclár seo. (Seosamh Ó Cualáin will be chatting to Máirtín on this show.)
Téann muintir Malcolm agus muintir Stevie ar saoire le chéile ar bhád cónaithe. (Malcolm and Stevie's families vacation together on a houseboat.)

Caithfidh Jessica dhá dhúnmharú a réiteach chun ainm a seanchara Andy a ghlanadh. (Jessica has to solve two murders to clear the name of her old friend Deputy Andy.)
